use_codes.desc: METHOD OF TREATING A SKIN DISEASE WITH A CORTICOSTEROID-CONTAINING PHARMACEUTICAL COMPOSITION

indications.text:
OLUX Foam is a super-potent topical corticosteroid indicated for short-term topical treatment of the
inflammatory and pruritic manifestations of moderate to severe corticosteroid-responsive dermatoses
of the scalp, and for short-term topical treatment of mild to moderate plaque-type psoriasis of non...

OLUX Foam is a corticosteroid indicated for treatment of moderate to severe plaque psoriasis of
the scalp and mild to moderate plaque psoriasis of non-scalp regions of the body excluding the
face and intertriginous areas in patients 12 years and older.
